user.title: Maytronics Dolphin (BLE)
user.description: Select a Dolphin advertising GATT service FFF0, or enter the MAC manually.

manual.title: Enter Bluetooth MAC
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your Dolphin (as shown in the Bluetooth integration or nRF Connect).

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Dolphin
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not a MyDolphin FFF0 robot

init.title: Maytronics Dolphin options
init.description: By default HA connects for each poll/command, then disconnects. Responsive mode uses faster adaptive PS_State polling (does not keep BLE connected). Use Release Bluetooth or power-cycle if the BT LED gets stuck.

data.ble_keepalive_seconds: Periodic BLE release (ignored when persistent session is on)
